semantic.role: Test module for the CLI initialization command (init) using vitest and child_process to validate CLI behavior.
responsibilities: Provide automated test coverage for the CLI init command, verifying correct behavior with simulated user input and temporary directories.
Set up isolated temporary file systems for each test case via makeTempDir.
Generate wrapper scripts that pipe predefined answers into the interactive CLI prompts via writeWrapperScript.
Teardown temporary directories after each test to maintain clean state.
outOfScope: Production code logic of the init command itself—only tests its observable behavior.
Handling of edge cases not covered by the test scenarios (e.g., network failures, permission errors).
Any exported API—this file is a test suite, not a library module.
invariants: Test file must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts. (rule: test-file-suffix)

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Maintain and verify the correctness of the CLI init command through automated integration tests, ensuring that changes to the CLI (e.g., removal of legacy aliases) do not break initialization flow.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Align test suite with the refactor that removed legacy CLI aliases and fixed schema and tests. This test file may have been updated to reflect the new command structure.
